title: Hollowmarch
description: Discover unique structures, face new threats, and explore a more immersive world with Hollowmarch.
body:
Hollowmarch

Hollowmarch is an exploration-focused Minecraft mod that adds handcrafted structures, custom mobs, atmospheric encounters, and expanded world generation.

The mod is designed to make exploration feel more rewarding while keeping every structure tied to its biome, atmosphere, and purpose.

Currently available for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge) and Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge).

Features

Hollowmarch currently includes:

  • Handcrafted structures across many biome types
  • Custom hostile mobs and unique items
  • New paintings to decorate your builds and discoveries
  • Custom enchantments with unique effects
  • Structure-based loot and exploration rewards
  • Atmospheric world generation
  • Compatibility with popular biome mods, including Terralith support
  • Active development and frequent updates

Required mods:

  • GeckoLib
  • Supplementaries
  • Create

Structure Gallery

Want to see all structures before discovering them in-game?

Cursed Mansion

A large mansion found in dark forests, taigas, and other gloomy regions.

Desert Obelisk

An ancient desert monument hidden among sands, dunes, and dry wastelands.

Frozen Igloo

A cold shelter found in snowy and frozen biomes.

Jungle Obelisk

An overgrown monument buried in jungles and lush tropical regions.

Lighthouse

A coastal structure found near oceans, beaches, and shorelines.

Palm Haven

A warm desert oasis-style structure found in hot and sandy regions.

Phantome Nest

A mysterious nest-like structure found in eerie, elevated, and forested places.

Pirates Fall

A pirate-themed structure.

Raid Camp

A hostile camp found across open plains, sparse forests, and traveler routes.

Sea Obelisk

A strange ocean monument found in deep waters and sea biomes.

Shell House

A small coastal house found around beaches, shores, and tropical coasts.

Stone Spire

A tall stone formation found in rocky, mountainous, and rugged terrain.

Sultan's Bazaar

A desert market filled with villagers, traders, loot, and danger.

Cloudbreaker

A massive airship drifting above the world, filled with engineers, rare loot, strange wool, and airborne danger.

Traveler Obelisk

A road-side monument found in open lands, plains, and exploration routes.

Twin Keep

A tall fortress-like structure found in cold forests, taigas, and dark woodland biomes.

Development

Hollowmarch is actively being developed. New structures, mobs, biome support, and gameplay features are planned.

Updates will be released frequently, and community feedback is highly appreciated.

If you find bugs or have ideas, please join the Discord server.
